title: cytisus supinus subsp. smyrnaeus
intro: Cytisus supinus subsp. smyrnaeus, also known as Smyrna Laburnum or Greek Laburnum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cytisus supinus subsp. smyrnaeus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, and can be obtained from the leaves, bark, and flowers of the plant.
